items.value: IF board(%1|->%0)=0 THEN "" ELSE FORMAT_TO_STRING("~w",[board(%1|->%0)]) END

LET v BE v = board(%1|->%0) IN (IF v=0 THEN "#efedea" ELSIF v=1 THEN "#5b7aa6" ELSIF v=2 THEN "#c9893a" ELSIF v=3 THEN "#b55b5b" ELSIF v=4 THEN "#5f9a93" ELSIF v=5 THEN "#5b8f63" ELSIF v=6 THEN "#c8b25a" ELSIF v=7 THEN "#8b6f9a" ELSE "#9a7a5f" END) END
